verifyEmail.title: Check Your Email

verifyEmail.noEmail: Didn't receive it? Check spam, or

hero.subtitle: Upload a Word (.docx) file, confirm scope in chat, then let specialized agents collaborate in parallel—enable only the format, logic, AI-trace, and reference agents you need. Credits scale with selected agents and word-count tier; structured reports usually arrive within minutes.
hero.typedText: Research on Image Recognition Based on Deep Learning

preview.chatPrompt: Detected a computer-vision master thesis. Focus on logic, format, or run all four agents?

features.title: Not just checking,
features.subtitle: Built for Chinese thesis workflows: pick modules in chat, read results in tabs—no vague “does everything” claims.

multiAgent.title: Multi-agent collaboration
multiAgent.desc: Dedicated agents for format, logic, AI trace, and references work in parallel without blocking each other. The format agent is optional (off by default to save credits) and can be enabled anytime.

chat.title: Conversational setup
chat.desc: After upload, confirm degree type, priorities, and format notes; the dashboard shows an estimated credit cost before you start.

visual.title: Visible progress
visual.desc: A live agent timeline shows queueing, running, and completion; streaming updates reduce the “black box” wait.

format.title: Format & layout
format.desc: Uses your format brief plus Word layout semantics (headers/footers, page numbers, etc.). Reference styling is checked against common GB/T 7714-2015 issues.

logic.title: Logic & argument
logic.desc: Paragraph-level clues and argument-chain checks—abstract/conclusion alignment, leaps in reasoning, common defense risks.

aitrace.title: AI trace hints
aitrace.desc: Highlights AI-like phrasing and expression risks across the body text so you can rewrite before submission (advisory only, not an academic verdict).

howItWorks.title: Four steps to
howItWorks.subtitle: From upload to report, fully automated—no tedious forms

upload.title: Upload thesis
upload.desc: Drop a Word (.docx) file; we parse structure and word count. Optional research field. PDF and legacy .doc are not supported.

chat.title: Conversational config
chat.desc: Confirm degree level, focus, whether to enable format review, and your format notes. You’ll see the credit estimate before the run starts.

parallel.title: Multi-agent collaboration
parallel.desc: Selected agents run in parallel with live status for each one.

report.title: Review & export
report.desc: Results are split across Format, Logic, AI trace, and References tabs. Export a Markdown bundle from the report view, or print to PDF from the browser.

preview.title: Review report · Deep learning image recognition

demoIssues.text: Section 3.3 reads circular—reorder the analysis chain and add an explicit contrast or control.
Several paragraphs share highly templated phrasing; rewrite with concrete numbers and qualifiers to reduce false AI positives.
Reference [12] may be missing year/volume fields—double-check against GB/T 7714-2015.
Figure 2-3 is cited as “Fig. 2-4” in the text—align numbering with the first in-text mention.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing,
pricing.subtitle: Prepaid credits, no subscription. Balance never expires; each run bills only the modules you select, with word-count tiers—see the estimate in-app before you start.

single.name: Single Pass
single.desc: Try modular review and the credit model
features: Credits added to your wallet, deducted per run
Pick any combination of four modules
Markdown export from the report view
Support tickets when enabled by ops

standard.name: Standard Bundle
features: Larger credit pool, still modular per run
Four report tabs plus full history
Up to ~120k Chinese characters per thesis (see in-app limit)

pro.name: Pro Bundle
pro.desc: For labs and teaching assistants helping many students
features: Automatic partial refunds for failed modules
Same per-thesis word cap as other tiers

pricing.ruleMaxNote: Theses over the configured word cap cannot start; check the dashboard for the live limit

faq.title: You might ask
faq.subtitle: Questions? You may find answers here

items.a: MVP targets Chinese university theses (bachelor/master/PhD). Upload Word (.docx) only—up to 50MB per file and within the configured Chinese-character cap (currently about 120k, shown in-app). PDF upload is not supported yet.
Purchased credits never expire. Buy anytime, use anytime.
All uploads are encrypted. HTTPS in transit. PII is auto-masked in logs. Content is never used for training or sharing.

Runs auto-retry. If a specific module still fails, its credits are refunded from the stored cost snapshot while successful modules stay in the report. If every enabled module fails mid-orchestration, we fully refund and reset the job to pending. Rare hard failures may route to manual support.
Yes. Export a Markdown bundle from the report screen for Word/Notion workflows. For PDF, use your browser’s print-to-PDF.
WeChat Pay and Alipay (via Zpay). Stripe/PayPal planned.

ctaBanner.title2: let AI check your thesis first
ctaBanner.subtitle: Signup includes starter credits—upload your .docx, review the cost estimate, then start when you’re ready. No card required.

footer.slogan: AI thesis pre-review: Word-native upload, chat-based configuration, multi-agent collaboration, and transparent credits per agent.

testimonials.name: Wang
testimonials.text: The references tab flagged missing fields faster than eyeballing a PDF export. AI-trace hints also pushed me to rewrite a few templated paragraphs.

testimonials.name: Chen
testimonials.text: Logic review caught a reasoning leap I’d glossed over. Modular billing let me run logic first and skip format when I was low on credits.

testimonials.name: Li
testimonials.text: Uploading docx and toggling modules in chat feels natural. Exporting Markdown back into Word for formatting tweaks is quick.

dashboard.settingsSubtitle: Manage your avatar, display name and other profile information

review.historyEmpty: No sessions yet—completed reviews will appear here
review.uploadInvalidFile: Only .docx is supported—not legacy .doc or PDF
review.uploadConfirmBusyHint: Large files may take a while to upload and process — please wait and keep this page open.
review.docxEmbeddedObjectTip: Tip: Embedded objects such as Visio diagrams are not read reliably. For better logic review, export complex structure or flowcharts as PNG or JPEG images and insert those into the document.
review.chatWelcomeAfterUpload: Welcome to ThesisAI — I’ve received your thesis for this review session. Below are your paper and domain; then you’ll see the review plan.
review.chatPlanIntro: Your review plan is ready — adjust if needed, then hit Start.
review.chatPlanRunningIntro: Review started — scope below matches your submission settings.
review.chatPlanArchiveIntro: Review completed — scope below matches your submission settings.
review.planRunningFooter: Open the Progress tab for live stage updates.
review.paperSubtitleInPlan: Word count and estimated credits are in the review plan below.
review.domainEditHint: Editing domain regenerates the review plan from current settings
review.planFormatHeavyWarning: This step is very slow — use with care
review.planStepHint: Choose which checks to run — format check is off by default (slow). Other items default on. Uncheck to narrow scope.
review.planScopeSummary: Checked items ran in this session; unchecked items were not in scope.
review.formatRequirementsPlaceholder: Paste your school’s rules, or import the default template and edit…
review.formatRequirementsHint: Required when format check is enabled. Used for semantic review and rule extraction.
review.formatRequirementsHintApplied: The format notes below were provided at submission and used for this review.
review.progressFooterHint: You can close this page or switch tabs anytime—agents keep working in the background. Check History when it’s done.
review.progressBarFootnote: This can take a while—feel free to step away. If something goes wrong, open a support ticket and we’ll take care of it.
review.progressHintPending: Allocating compute—this agent will start shortly…
review.progressHintFailedNoLog: This stage failed. Check the log below or contact support.
review.progressRunning_format: Analyzing layout and semantics against your format rules…
review.progressRunning_logic: Reading the full text for argument and structure issues…
review.progressRunning_aitrace: Scanning the text for AI-trace signals…
review.progressRunning_reference: Working on references (parsing entries and verification)…
review.reportPlaceholder: When the run finishes, this tab shows structured findings and suggestions.
review.reportEmptySection: No data for this section yet
review.reportModuleRefundNotice: This module failed due to a system error. {credits} credit(s) have been automatically refunded.
review.manualReviewReassuranceTitle: Your task is being handled manually
review.manualReviewReassuranceBody: The system encountered an error during processing and has automatically suspended your task for manual review. Once the issue is confirmed, your credits will be refunded and the review will be reset for re-submission. For assistance, contact support via WeChat: {wechat}
review.reportSkipped: This item was not enabled in your review plan, so there is no report for it.
review.reportLegacyShape: The payload does not match the current visual schema; showing raw data.
review.reportNoIssuesHint: Nothing was flagged in this dimension. Use Export Markdown for the full combined report.
review.reportFormatExperimentalDisclaimer: Format checking is still being refined and validated. The items below are for self-review only—not a final ruling. If anything conflicts with your school’s guidelines or your final manuscript, follow those.
review.reportSectionRunSummary: Found {count} issue(s), total time about {seconds} s.
review.reportRefsEmptyHint: The document may lack a bibliography section or entries; use Raw JSON to inspect the task output.

errors.FILE_NOT_DOCX: Only Word .docx is supported—not legacy .doc or PDF
errors.INVALID_STATUS: Cannot start review in this state
errors.PAGE_COUNT_OUT_OF_RANGE: Page count out of allowed range
errors.PAGE_COUNT_REQUIRED: Valid page count is required—please re-select the file and try again
errors.PAGE_COUNT_INVALID: Invalid page count or exceeds the allowed maximum
errors.PAGE_COUNT_PARSE: Could not read this PDF’s page count—try another file or try again later
errors.WORD_COUNT_OUT_OF_RANGE: Word count exceeds the allowed limit—shorten the document and try again
errors.WORD_COUNT_FAILED: Could not count words in this file—it may be corrupted
errors.STAGING_INVALID: Staging file is invalid or expired—upload again
errors.TRIGGER_NOT_CONFIGURED: Background jobs aren’t configured—credits were refunded. Try again later or contact support.
errors.TRIGGER_DISPATCH_FAILED: Could not start the background job—credits were refunded. Please try again.
errors.ROLLBACK_FAILED: Refund step failed—don’t retry repeatedly; contact support.
errors.RUN_ALREADY_ATTACHED: A run already exists for this review.
errors.PLAN_EMPTY: Select at least one review item
errors.FORMAT_GUIDELINES_REQUIRED: Format check is on—please enter format requirements or import the default template
errors.GENERIC: Something went wrong, try again later

review.uploadDragLabel: Drag & drop or click to select Word (.docx)

tickets.title: Support Tickets
tickets.subtitle: Handle auto-suspended review tasks
tickets.confirmRefundResolve: Refund all credits for this review and mark the ticket as resolved? This cannot be undone.
tickets.confirmResolveOnly: Mark this ticket as resolved? The linked review will not be modified.
